text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On one cold winter's night, with the Arima Kinen
almost upon us... A rustling sound startles me out
of my sleep. I open my eyes, still dazed, and see...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Why hello there, guinea pig. You're awake!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Keep your voice down. For the record, entering
the premises after hours is regarded as a violation
of the school's policies. You wouldn't want to get
in trouble, would you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Take a guess. No, let me ask you a question.
What is today?
choice_data_list: The day of the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Correct, but not what I was going for. It's the
holiday season.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
On that note, dear guinea pig, happy holidays!
Here's a present from me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The presents I've received from her in the past
have rarely left a good impression on me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Whaaat, you don't like it?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I prepared this gift so we could become
psychologically closer, you know?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I have my suspicions. But if this gift is indeed
genuine, I run the risk of damaging the level of
trust we've built together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I open up the packaging to reveal a small drink
inside.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ta-da! One Tachyon-made energy drink, coming
right up! A sip of this and you'll be running
marathons!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Seeing how you're always so hard at work, I
thought you might be close to approaching the
threshold of a burnout.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: So, what are you waiting for? Bottoms up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If it's a drink she's concocted, I bet my body'll end
up glowing a yellow-green hue or my hair turning
an ocean blue... Either way, this can't end well.
choice_data_list: No way! I'm positive it's a trap!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean?! I put in so much effort too!
The panax ginseng root, for example, was
procured and delivered all the way from rural
China!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
How disheartening it is to think these purest
intentions of mine would be met with rejection.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I suppose this is the result of my past actions. A
fitting response to the Umamusume who cried
wolf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Pained by her dejected frown, I swiftly down the
bottle, sealing my fate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I close my eyes in worried anticipation.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh-heh, hahahaha! Just how much longer do
you plan to keep your eyes shut?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Nothing is happening. If anything...
choice_data_list: I feel all traces of my fatigue gone!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Didn't I tell you? It's just an energy drink. I
wouldn't think of punishing you on a holiday.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
At least for today, I wanted to express my
gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, that was that. There is little to be gained
from further intrusion of your time. I'll take my
leave and go back to sleep.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But before I go, you would do well to look
forward to today's Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After saying that, she then exits via the window.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sweet aftertaste in my mouth combined with
the winter draft flowing in, contrary to
expectation, feels quite pleasant.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I open up the packaging to reveal a scented
candle inside.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: A scented candle handmade by yours truly!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's a well established fact that the flame of a
candle fluctuates at the so-called 1/f frequency.
Not only that, the candle's fragrance has
therapeutic effects to both the body and mind.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I specifically chose to incorporate lavender and
neroli oils, both known for their calming qualities.
I also added an infusion of other aromatics to
your liking, which I took the liberty of researching
through your private matters.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, long story short, I'm sure you'll love the
present! Come on, light it up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I light the scented candle, as per her request.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Take a whiff, it smells so...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Terrible. It smells kind of sour, savory, bitter, and
spicy all at the same time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An unbearable smell wafts through the entire
room!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ha-ha-ha! My apologies! I had forgotten to test
it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
H-hold on, this could be really really bad! Oh,
that reeks! Tactical retreat! We have to run,
guinea pig!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Heh-heh, hehehe—ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Wow, it's been quite a while since I panicked!
What a calamitous odor!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I thought I mixed the formula well, but I suppose I
should avoid things I don't normally do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Putting aside the resulting mess, she did try to
make a real present for me. Those feelings have
been well and truly conveyed.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. As always, you're such a good-natured
person. As for myself, I'm beginning to feel a tad
bit queasy.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's always frustrating when you set out to do
something but fall short.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh silly me, I forgot that the expression of
gratitude isn't limited to tangible tokens of
appreciation—it can be articulated in verbal form
as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if a light bulb went on in her head just now,
she turns and faces me once again.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Thank you for everything, dear Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: This may sound cliché, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She stops mid-sentence and looks away
awkwardly.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...W-wait a moment. This is so much more
embarrassing than I had imagined.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel that our relationship has gotten just a bit
closer after being able to see this rare side of her.
